title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-1158
summary: Sidharth Chauhan, Managing Director of Sidhartha Buildhome Pvt. Ltd., was accused of duping over 800 homebuyers through two real estate projects — 'Estella' and 'NCR One' — by collecting payments and loans worth hundreds of crores, but failing to deliver the promised flats.
